message:
refactor: Improve async primitives and test infrastructure

Updates across runtime, sync primitives, and tests:

1. Runtime/reactor improvements
2. Stream combinators (fuse, take) refinements
3. Sync primitives (mutex, notify, once_cell) enhancements
4. Benchmark updates (timer_wheel)
5. Test infrastructure improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
